linguistic.text: URGENT: The city water supply in Sector 7 has been contaminated by hostile actors! Do not drink! Spread the word immediately to everyone you know! PANIC IS JUSTIFIED!
Everyone meet at the main junction at 8 PM tonight. Bring weapons. We will take back what is ours by force. Revenge is the only way!
linguistic.description: Explicit call to action and violence.

multimodal.text: Peaceful protests continuing in the downtown area. Citizens are gathered for a silent vigil.
multimodal.description: Text claims peace, but visual evidence shows a violent riot (Context Mismatch).

multimodal.text: New military base being built in the restricted forest zone. See the satellite proof.
multimodal.description: Accurate reporting with supporting visual evidence.
